changeSet.author: timesheet-app
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `timesheet_project` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `project_name` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '项目名称', `mode` TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT '记录模式: 1-签到 2-人工记工', `status` TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '项目状态: 1-编辑中 2-已结束', `creator_account` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '创建者账号', `creator_name` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '创建者姓名', `remark` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '备注', `finished_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结束时间', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', `is_delete` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否删除', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='工时项目表';

changeSet.author: timesheet-app
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `timesheet_project_member` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `project_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '项目ID', `member_account` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '成员账号', `member_name` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '成员姓名', `join_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '加入时间', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', `is_delete` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否删除', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), UNIQUE KEY `uk_ts_member_project_account` (`project_id`, `member_account`), KEY `idx_ts_member_project` (`project_id`), KEY `idx_ts_member_account` (`member_account`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='项目成员表';

changeSet.author: timesheet-app
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `timesheet_attendance_record` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `project_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '项目ID', `member_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '成员ID', `member_account` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '成员账号', `member_name` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '成员姓名', `work_date` DATE NOT NULL COMMENT '工时日期', `sign_in_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '签到时间', `sign_out_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '离班签到时间', `work_hours` DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '出工时长', `work_units` DECIMAL(6,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '折算工数', `record_status` TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '记录状态: 1-待签离 2-已完成 3-已补签通过', `remark` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '备注', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', `is_delete` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否删除', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), UNIQUE KEY `uk_ts_att_project_member_date` (`project_id`, `member_id`, `work_date`), KEY `idx_ts_att_project_member` (`project_id`, `member_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='签到工时记录表';

changeSet.author: timesheet-app
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `timesheet_makeup_request` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `project_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '项目ID', `member_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '成员ID', `member_account` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '成员账号', `member_name` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '成员姓名', `work_date` DATE NOT NULL COMMENT '工时日期', `makeup_sign_in_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '补签到时间', `makeup_sign_out_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '补离班时间', `reason` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '补签原因', `approval_status` TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '审批状态: 1-待审批 2-通过 3-拒绝', `approver_account` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '审批人账号', `approver_name` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '审批人姓名', `approval_remark` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '审批备注', `approval_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '审批时间', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', `is_delete` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否删除', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_ts_makeup_project` (`project_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='补签申请表';

changeSet.author: timesheet-app
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `timesheet_manual_worklog` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `project_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '项目ID', `member_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '成员ID', `member_account` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '成员账号', `member_name` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '成员姓名', `work_date` DATE NOT NULL COMMENT '工时日期', `work_units` DECIMAL(6,2) NOT NULL COMMENT '工数', `remark` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '备注', `maintained_by` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '维护人账号', `maintained_by_name` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '维护人姓名', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', `is_delete` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否删除', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), UNIQUE KEY `uk_ts_manual_project_member_date` (`project_id`, `member_id`, `work_date`), KEY `idx_ts_manual_project_member` (`project_id`, `member_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='人工记工表';

changeSet.author: timesheet-app
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `timesheet_settlement` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `project_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '项目ID', `settlement_no` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '结算编号', `settlement_type` TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT '结算类型: 1-单人 2-批量 3-项目结束', `settled_by` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结算人账号', `settled_by_name` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结算人姓名', `item_count` INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '明细数', `total_work_hours` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '总工时', `total_work_units` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '总工数', `unit_salary` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '每工薪资', `total_salary` DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '总薪资', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), UNIQUE KEY `uk_ts_settlement_no` (`settlement_no`), KEY `idx_ts_settlement_project` (`project_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='结算主表';

changeSet.author: timesheet-app
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `timesheet_settlement_item` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `settlement_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '结算ID', `project_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '项目ID', `member_id` BIGINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '成员ID', `member_account` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '成员账号', `member_name` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '成员姓名', `work_date` DATE DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '工时日期', `source_mode` TINYINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '来源模式: 1-签到 2-人工记工', `source_record_id` BIGINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '来源记录ID', `work_hours` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '工时', `work_units` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '工数', `unit_salary` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '每工薪资', `salary_amount` DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '薪资金额', `remark` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '备注', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_ts_settlement_item_settlement` (`settlement_id`), KEY `idx_ts_settlement_item_member` (`member_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='结算明细表';

changeSet.author: timesheet-app
